title: oldenlandia ciliicaulis
intro: Oldenlandia ciliicaulis, a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions, is a species within the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Oldenlandia ciliicaulis include its ability to relieve fever, reduce swelling, and aid in the treatment of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia ciliicaulis is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
